title: Slippery Bridge
description: While crossing a rickety wooden bridge, there is a sudden [blue][jitter]torrent of rain[/jitter][/blue]. [purple][sine]Massive gusts of wind[/sine][/purple] buffet you, threatening to end your journey.

options.title: Overcome
options.description: [red][a random card from your deck][/red] is removed from your [gold]Deck[/gold].

options.title: Hold On
options.description: Lose [red]3 HP[/red] (increases by 1 with each Hold On). The card in the above option is randomized.

conditions: All players must have at least one removable card
notes:
Each time you choose [gold]Hold On[/gold], you take [red]unblockable[/red] damage (ignores powers) and the event advances to a new page. The HP cost starts at [red]3[/red] and increases by 1 with each hold ([red]3[/red], [red]4[/red], [red]5[/red], ...). After each hold, a new card is selected for the [gold]Overcome[/gold] option — but no card is actually removed until you choose [gold]Overcome[/gold].

The [gold]Overcome[/gold] card selection: on the initial page, a random non-Basic removable card is chosen. After each [gold]Hold On[/gold], a card of a [gold]different type[/gold] than the previously shown card is selected. If no such card exists, it falls back to any removable card.

The event has 7 unique pages of escalating distress text. After 7 or more holds, the page loops indefinitely — the developer apologizes for running out of content.
